operators.title: Change
info: Operates on T-Mobile and Verizon networks in the United States of America.
operators.other_info: This eSIM is for travelers to the United States. The coverage applies to all 50 states of the United States, and Puerto Rico.

packages.title: 1 GB - 7 Days
packages.short_info: This eSIM doesn't come with a phone number.
packages.qr_installation:
eSIM name: Change

Coverage: United States

To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:

  1. Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.
  2. Scan QR code.
  3. Confirm eSIM plan details.
  4. Label the eSIM.

To access Data:

  1. Enable data roaming.

To top up:

Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.
packages.manual_installation:
eSIM name: Change

Coverage: United States

To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:

  1. Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.
  2. Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.
  3. Confirm eSIM plan details.
  4. Label the eSIM.

To access Data:

  1. Enable data roaming.

To top up:

Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.

operators.title: Change+
info: Operates on the T-Mobile network in the United States of America.
operators.other_info: This eSIM is for travelers to the United States. The coverage does applies to US states, except for Alaska. Puerto Rico is also covered. Incoming calls are deducted from the minutes balance. Outgoing international calls are not allowed.

operators.title: Élan
info: Operates on the Orange network in France.
operators.other_info: You can add a top-up to this eSIM within 120 days from when it was activated. Adding a new package will reset this period.

operators.title: Chinacom
info: Operates on the China Mobile network in China.

packages.title: Unlimited - 10 Days
packages.qr_installation:
eSIM name: Chinacom

Coverage: China

To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:

  1. Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.
  2. Scan QR code.
  3. Confirm eSIM plan details.
  4. Label the eSIM.

To access Data:

  1. Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.
  2. Update the APN to "globaldata".
  3. Enable data roaming.

To top up:

Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.

  1. Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.
  2. Update the APN to "globaldata".
  3. Enable data roaming.

To top up:

Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.
packages.manual_installation:
eSIM name: Chinacom

Coverage: China

To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:

  1. Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.
  2. Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.
  3. Confirm eSIM plan details.
  4. Label the eSIM.

To access Data:

  1. Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.
  2. Update the APN to "globaldata".
  3. Enable data roaming.

To top up:

Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.

packages.qr_installation:
eSIM name: Chinacom

Coverage: China

To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:

  1. Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.
  2. Scan QR code.
  3. Confirm eSIM plan details.
  4. Label the eSIM.

To access Data:

  1. Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.
  2. Update the APN to "globaldata".
  3. Enable data roaming.

To top up:

Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.
